prompt: A polished anime-style illustration of a young Japanese woman standing in a modern video game store aisle, posed like a store clerk or promotional staff member. She has long, straight dark brown hair with soft shine and gentle layered ends, and she wears a fitted navy business suit with exactly 4 visible clothing/accessory pieces: a navy blazer, a matching pencil skirt, a white dress shirt, and a bright red necktie, plus a staff ID badge hanging from her waist. Her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth blank blur with no facial features. She stands in a relaxed three-quarter pose, slightly turned toward the viewer, holding up a PS5 game case with both hands at chest height to present it. The game cover title should read TRACE: TOKYO, showing an anime schoolgirl over a Tokyo city background. Set the scene inside a PlayStation-branded retail section with 2 dominant PS5 signs visible on the right side, multiple blue PlayStation displays, and shelves densely stocked with PS5 game boxes. Include 1 large floor display box for the same featured game near the lower left, and many repeated PS5 cases on the right shelf, with a few red-spined game cases on the lower shelves for color contrast. In the back left, add a large blue wall sign reading PLAY HAS NO LIMITS. In the mid-background, add 1 vertical red banner with Japanese text reading 未来は上にある。. Use warm overhead spotlights, a realistic game shop interior with exposed industrial ceiling fixtures, glossy tile floor reflections, and cinematic depth. Composition is vertical smartphone aspect ratio, full-body framing, slightly low eye-level perspective, with the woman centered-left and the PS5 shelf dominating the right side. Render in high-detail contemporary anime key art style, clean linework, soft shading, realistic store lighting, rich blue tones, and a premium promotional illustration feel.
